title: “I Was Taken By Aliens In 1997!” -President of Russian Republic
summary: Kirsan Ilyumzhinov, former president of the Russian Republic of Kalmykia and president of FIDE (World Chess Federation), describes his 1997 alleged alien encounter in detail, including being taken aboard a spacecraft and communicating telepathically with extraterrestrial beings. The interview also covers his interactions with world leaders regarding UFO knowledge, including conversations with Kissinger, Gorbachev, and claims about US-Soviet UFO information sharing.

acronyms.definition: International governing body for chess that includes about 200 countries
Soviet Union's security agency and secret police

organizations_mentioned: Russian Chamber of Businessmen and Entrepreneurs

events.description: Yuri Gagarin became the first person in space on April 12th
Kirsan Ilyumzhinov's first visit with a parliamentary delegation from the Soviet Union to meet Henry Kissinger
Kirsan Ilyumzhinov met with Pope John Paul II
Kirsan Ilyumzhinov claims he was taken aboard an alien spacecraft in September while in Moscow

key_claims.claim: Kirsan Ilyumzhinov was taken aboard an alien spacecraft in September 1997 while he was president of Kalmykia
Three witnesses (driver, assistant/minister, and friend) searched his apartment for over an hour and could not find him before he suddenly appeared from the bedroom
NASA officially records about 4,000 cases per year of people noticing unidentified objects
The aliens communicated telepathically and told him humanity has not yet reached the level of civilization to communicate with them
After Nixon showed Brezhnev a folder with classified information, both the US and Soviet Union stopped all moon exploration and flights
Mikhail Gorbachev spoke about various civilizations that have made contact with representatives of Earth
Henry Kissinger was very knowledgeable about UFO materials and documents located at the US President's Administration, CIA, or NASA
Pope John Paul II signed a decree establishing a special observatory within the Vatican for research into extraterrestrial civilizations and UFOs
The KGB of the USSR had a special department for researching unknown flying objects and underwater objects
A president of a G7 country also witnessed UFOs while on vacation but refused to go public due to political concerns
